programmes.show_description: From blockbuster smashes and explosive road rage, to crazy police chases and thieving animals - it's all Caught on Dashcam in this epic series finale! (S5, ep 10)
The police get way more than they bargain for when they pursue a fleeing driver, then meet one of the drunkest men you'll ever see. (S16, ep 2)
A runaway driver clocks huge speeds as he flees from police, a motorcyclist goes head first through a car window and a man suffers an asthma attack - or does he? (S16, ep 3)
A driver flees a late-night crash scene; a chainsaw-wielding biker attracts police attention; and one of the weirdest breakdowns you'll see. (S16, ep 4)
A trucker unleashes carnage on the motorway, an obnoxious drunk hassles police and a man who looks like a chimney sweep needs police help. (S16, ep 5)
A domestic ends in a car crash, but the fight keeps going. A belligerent drunk takes on the cops. (S16, ep 6)
New Zealand reality series following the work of customs officers as they prevent drug smuggling, illegal immigrants and more. (S9, ep 1)
New Zealand reality series following the work of customs officers as they prevent drug smuggling, illegal immigrants and more. (S9, ep 2)
New Zealand reality series following the work of customs officers as they prevent drug smuggling, illegal immigrants and more. (S9, ep 3)
New Zealand reality series following the work of customs officers as they prevent drug smuggling, illegal immigrants and more. (S9, ep 4)
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
When a truck crashes the driver tries to lie his way out of trouble, unaware that cameras have caught it all. (S16, ep 15)
A couple are lucky to be alive after a tangle with a truck, police catch two committed marijuana enthusiasts and a woman blatantly breaks the law in front of the cops. (S16, ep 16)
While an American's trip to Alaska heads south, officers suspect a convicted drug dealer is taking his business north. A ship containing weapons is also searched. (S2, ep 14)
Officers stop a father and son packing loads of ammo, but can't find the gun. Meanwhile, the Vessel Search Unit find a suspect sailor on a US tug. (S2, ep 15)
Single Kids: Patrick Aryee looks at how single offspring depend on one critical life companion - their mother, who will go to extraordinary lengths to care for them. (S1, ep 1)
Brothers & Sisters: Patrick Aryee explores how some siblings quickly forge lifelong bonds, while others compete ferociously from the moment they're born. (S1, ep 2)
Outnumbered: For animals born in bulk, life is a battle from the very start. Patrick marvels at the many strategies nature has come up with to raise the next generation. (S1, ep 3)
Unlock your imagination as a young orphan discovers a magical garden when she's sent to live on her uncle's estate. Colin Firth stars. (2020)(100 mins)
Three visitors from Malaysia raise alarms when it emerges that they've cancelled their accommodation just before their flight and their lies begin to unravel. (S15, ep 9)
When a Chinese bulk carrier docks in Newcastle it appears there's been a major security breach and what the Border Force officers find is shocking. (S15, ep 10)
Border Force investigate the claims of two people who claim to be on their honeymoon when their travel itinerary raises alarm bells. (S15, ep 11)
A man struggles to explain what his plans are for a three-month trip to Australia, and suspicion heightens when a drug dog takes an interest in his bag. (S15, ep 12)
Shadowplay: Odo and Dax try to solve the mystery of an alien planet whose inhabitants have been disappearing without explanation.
The Curse: After the death of his mentor, Daniel Jackson is reunited with a friend and a foe from his past. (S4, ep 13)
Endgame: In the first of a two-parter, Admiral Kathryn Janeway decides to change the past in order to undo the toll taken on the crew during their arduous journey home. (S7, ep 25)
When The Bough Breaks: The Enterprise discovers a planet whose inhabitants then proceed to kidnap several children from the ship in order to perpetuate their own race - including Wesley.
Documentary series following Australian Customs and Border Protection officers as they attempt to enforce the country's customs, quarantine, immigration and finance laws. (S15, ep 21)
Documentary series following Australian Customs and Border Protection officers as they attempt to enforce the country's customs, quarantine, immigration and finance laws. (S15, ep 22)
Sacrifice: The team must race to find the director of a Brooklyn migrant centre and his wife, who have been mysteriously abducted. (S6, ep 5)
Invisible: The team is pushed to its limits when a highly-skilled military veteran snaps. Crosby struggles when the case begins to hit too close to home.
Fortunate Son: Archer and the crew must intervene when a human freight vessel goes into battle with alien pirates. (S1, ep 10)
A Window of F*cking Opportunity: The Secret Service raids the Tong counterfeiting operation, forcing Ah Sahm to make a difficult choice. (S3, ep 10 of 10)
A call-out to a stabbing proves far from what it seems, while officers are left baffled when a suspected drink driver passes a breathalyser test. (S5, ep 6)
Action-packed documentary following rapid response officers, the fastest cops in Britain, as they crack down on crime. Time is of the essence! (S3, ep 9)
Documentary series following Australia's traffic enforcers. Officers face high-speed chases, defiant hooligans, explosive crashes and out-of-control drunk drivers. (S9, ep 1)
Documentary series following Australia's traffic enforcers. Officers face high-speed chases, defiant hooligans, explosive crashes and out-of-control drunk drivers. (S9, ep 2)
Immigration deal with a Singaporean national who claims to be meeting a mystery man. Plus, a flood in the biosecurity zone shuts down the airport. (S11, ep 5)
Documentary series following the men and woman who work to keep New Zealand's borders safe. (S11, ep 6)
Documentary following the men and women who help keep motorists safe on some of the most perilous highways and byways of New Zealand. (S9, ep 9)
Documentary following the men and women who help keep motorists safe on some of the most perilous highways and byways of New Zealand. (S9, ep 10)
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
A speeder gets way more than he bargains for, a van and car collide at high speed and an incoherent drunk man heads off to another city on foot. (S16, ep 17)
Lives are on the line when a runaway vehicle charges straight at police, a tourist has his own idea of the speed limit and a man gets so drunk he forgets his address. (S16, ep 18)
A young man's lies could keep him from his fiancee, while the discovery of a gold bar and lots of cash spell trouble for another traveller. (S2, ep 16)
While a last-minute booking leads a farm worker down a rocky road, the arrival of some toy trucks rightfully arouses suspicion. (S2, ep 17)
Fly-on-the-wall documentary following the men and women who defend Australia from drug runners, smugglers and terrorists. (S6, ep 1)
Fly-on-the-wall documentary following the men and women who defend Australia from drug runners, smugglers and terrorists. (S6, ep 2)

Follow Australia's traffic enforcers as they face high-speed chases, defiant hooligans, explosive crashes and out-of-control drunk drivers. (S10, ep 9)
Follow Australia's traffic enforcers as they face high-speed chases, defiant hooligans, explosive crashes and out-of-control drunk drivers. (S10, ep 10)
Cameras follow the men and women of the US border protection agencies as they uphold the country's much debated immigration policies. (S2, ep 3)
Cameras follow the men and women of the US border protection agencies as they uphold the country's much debated immigration policies. (S2, ep 4)
A family of foodies cook up some trouble in Biosecurity. Meanwhile, a dubious Christmas gift sent from the US raises eyebrows. (S12, ep 7)
An actress finds herself in trouble with Customs. Meanwhile, a unique drug concealment is discovered. (S12, ep 8)
Fly-on-the-wall documentary following the men and women who defend Australia from drug runners, smugglers and terrorists. (S5, ep 5)
Fly-on-the-wall documentary following the men and women who defend Australia from drug runners, smugglers and terrorists. (S5, ep 6)

Playing God: Dax and Arjin take a Runabout into the Gamma Quadrant and to their horror discover a tiny, developing universe that threatens to destroy the station.
Serpent's Venom: SG-1 undertakes a mission to disrupt a possible alliance between two powerful system lords. (S4, ep 14)
Endgame: The pioneering sci-fi drama drops out of orbit for good. Can Admiral Kathryn Janeway pull off her audacious plan in this last-ever instalment? (S7, ep 26)
Coming Of Age: Wesley takes the grueling Starfleet Academy entrance exam, while Picard finds himself the subject of an investigation into his competence.
Follow Australian Customs and Border Protection officers as they attempt to enforce the country's quarantine, customs, immigration and finance laws. (S16, ep 1)
Follow Australian Customs and Border Protection officers as they attempt to enforce the country's quarantine, customs, immigration and finance laws. (S16, ep 2)
A Fair to Remember: The crews respond to mass chaos and injuries when a ride malfunctions at the annual Edgewater town fair. (S1, ep 14)
Don't Say Her Name Again: The Fly Team attempts to bring a local predator to justice with on-site help from one of the victims, Charlotte Weston. (S2, ep 2)
Cold Front: When Archer invites a group of stargazers to come aboard the Enterprise, he encounters his Suliban nemesis once again. (S1, ep 11)
